tasks.pr_body: Make the Source summary report Citilink source access problems clearly instead of showing empty raw counts.
Add a conservative durable history log for offers, separate from notifications.

tasks.pr_title: Agent cycle log: pipeline validation run
tasks.pr_body: Docs-only change that proves the agent auto-merge pipeline works end-to-end through branch protection.

tasks.pr_title: Add retry/resume for transient agent cycle errors
tasks.pr_body: Distinguish transient from permanent errors, add exponential backoff, and save task checkpoints for recovery.
Document the autonomous Windows scheduled agent cycle and expected empty-queue behavior.

tasks.pr_title: Strengthen agent cycle empty queue tests
tasks.pr_body: Add regression coverage for empty queue mode and completed state entries.
Add a helper to show runnable, completed, failed, and review-needed tasks.
Add a local helper that summarizes the durable JSONL offer history.
Add regression coverage for normal and unavailable retailer source status reporting.
Prevent scheduled cycles from rerunning tasks that already need review or failed.
Allow low-risk docs-only and tests-only PRs while keeping agent infrastructure protected.
Make pushed work without a completed PR easier to detect and recover.
Add a helper to mark queue tasks completed after PR merge.
Improve recovery when a local task branch already exists from an earlier interrupted run.
Improve daily report readability and source summary formatting.
Deduplicate repeated offers before report generation while preserving source raw counts.
Add conservative maintenance for durable price history files.
Add classification for source statistics to support daily review.

tasks.pr_title: Add browser fallback for blocked RTX sources
tasks.pr_body: Retry blocked DNS and Citilink sources once with browser mode while preserving clear source status.
Wire existing retailer parser modules into the daily monitor while preserving per-source failure isolation.

tasks.pr_title: Fix Yandex Market offers rejected by filter
tasks.pr_body: Make valid Yandex RTX 5070 Ti offers pass the URL filter without weakening rejection for other sources.

tasks.pr_title: Add concurrency lock to agent cycle
tasks.pr_body: Prevent overlapping agent cycle runs by acquiring an exclusive lock file at cycle start.

tasks.pr_title: Add Playwright check and safe browser fetch helper
tasks.pr_body: Add check_playwright_installed(), fetch_html_safe(), and install_playwright_if_missing() to parsers/browser.py with tests.

tasks.pr_title: Add browser scraping for first dark RTX source
tasks.pr_body: Write a dedicated browser-based parser for one confirmed-dark source as proof-of-concept, with fixture tests.

tasks.pr_title: Add browser scraping for dark RTX sources (batch 2)
tasks.pr_body: Extend browser-based parsing to 2-3 more dark sources using the pattern from the first-source task.

tasks.pr_title: Add browser scraping for remaining dark RTX sources (batch 3)
tasks.pr_body: Handle remaining dark sources; document any that remain inaccessible with a structured comment.

tasks.pr_title: Agent cycle log: queue validation summary
tasks.pr_body: Final validation: full test suite, main cleanliness check, per-source smoke-check, summary report.

tasks.pr_title: fix: revive Citilink RTX 5070 Ti parser with live DOM selectors
tasks.pr_body: Verify and update Citilink dedicated parser selectors against the current live Playwright HTML. Add fixture test. Record live raw/accepted counts in PR body. NO auto-merge.

tasks.pr_title: fix: revive Wildberries RTX 5070 Ti parser or document WBAAS block
tasks.pr_body: Attempt fresh Playwright fetch with improved settings; write parse_browser_html if accessible, or document WBAAS block with dated evidence if not. Add fixture tests. NO auto-merge.

tasks.pr_title: feat: dedicated ComputerUniverse RTX 5070 Ti parser
tasks.pr_body: Replace generic scrape_search_page with a dedicated parse_cards parser using real DOM selectors from live Playwright HTML. Add fixture tests. Record live raw/accepted counts. NO auto-merge.

tasks.pr_title: feat: dedicated Avito RTX 5070 Ti parser
tasks.pr_body: Replace generic scrape_search_page with a dedicated parse_cards parser using real DOM selectors from live Playwright HTML. Handle used/new condition. Add fixture tests. Record live raw/accepted counts. NO auto-merge.
